falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above the 52-week high by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest a trend reversal contrary to the bottom pattern expectation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200% above the 20-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike would confirm a blowoff top, directly contradicting the current 'UNKNOWN' verdict and indicating a strong trend continuation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish crossover would signal a trend shift, falsifying the pattern's alignment with a bottom and invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
